focusAreas: Fix Q3 critical issues: enable c_mktsegment filter and correct hash table structure
Optimize Q3 join order: build on filtered customers, probe with orders, then build on filtered orders, probe with lineitem
Replace Q3's full sort with top-K heap for LIMIT 10 aggregation
Implement partitioned hash join for 64-core parallelism in Q3

Q1.notes: Correct 4-group aggregation (returnflag × linestatus). All aggregate values are positive and reasonable. Ordering correct (A|F, N|F, N|O, R|F). Total count_order = 59,142,609 rows processed, matching ~99% of ingested 59,986,052 lineitem rows after date filter.

Q3.notes: Top-10 results correctly ordered by revenue DESC (440715.22 → 415367.12). Customer filter selectivity 20.02% (300,276/1,500,000) matches expected ~20% for single market segment. Orders filtered to 1,461,923 reasonable given date predicate. All revenue values positive.

Q6.notes: Single aggregate value 1,230,113,636.01 is positive and reasonable given multi-predicate filter (shipdate range, discount, quantity). Result consistent with expected high selectivity (~0.7%) on 60M lineitem rows.

focusAreas: Replace std::unordered_map with Robin Hood hash tables in Q3 hash join (Priority 1: 2-3x expected speedup)
Switch Q1 to sorted aggregation for 4-group cardinality (Priority 4: 2x expected speedup)
Add SIMD filter evaluation to Q6 (Priority 5: 2x expected speedup)

Q1.notes: Correct 4-group aggregation (returnflag × linestatus). All aggregate values match baseline exactly (within floating-point epsilon). Ordering correct (A|F, N|F, N|O, R|F). Total count_order = 59,142,609 rows processed. PERFORMANCE IMPROVEMENT: 20% faster than baseline (80ms vs 100ms).

Q3.notes: Top-10 results correctly ordered by revenue DESC (440715.22 → 415367.12). One minor floating-point difference in row 2: 439855.32 vs baseline 439855.33 (epsilon=0.01, acceptable). Customer filter selectivity 20.02% (300,276/1,500,000) matches baseline. Orders filtered to 1,461,923 matches baseline. All revenue values positive. PERFORMANCE IMPROVEMENT: 43% faster than baseline (310ms vs 540ms).

Q6.notes: Single aggregate value 1,230,113,636.01 matches baseline exactly. Result consistent with expected high selectivity (~0.7%) on 60M lineitem rows. PERFORMANCE IMPROVEMENT: 45% faster than baseline (60ms vs 110ms).

focusAreas: Implement zone map block skipping for Q6 l_shipdate scan (Priority 1: skip 86% of blocks, 2-2.5x speedup expected)
Implement zone map block skipping for Q3 lineitem/orders date scans (Priority 2: skip 40-60% of blocks, 1.5-2x speedup expected)
Refactor Q6 SIMD to fully vectorize date comparisons (Priority 3: 1.3-1.5x additional speedup expected)

Q1.notes: Query executed successfully. Returns 4 groups (A|F, N|F, N|O, R|F) with aggregates. All values are reasonable and non-negative. Zone map shows excellent pruning (54% of blocks scanned).

Q3.notes: Query executed successfully. Returns top 10 orders by revenue, correctly sorted in descending order. Customer filtering (300,276 of 1.5M = 20%) and zone map pruning on lineitem (54% of blocks) working well. Revenue values are in expected range for SF10.

Q6.notes: Query executed successfully with excellent performance. Zone map pruning is highly effective (scanning only 15.28% of blocks, 9.2M rows). Single aggregate result (1.23B) is reasonable for SF10 dataset.
